featuresGrid.headline: Everything your restaurant POS needs.
featuresGrid.sub: A system that grows with your business – from caller ID to real-time analytics.

tiles.title: All platforms at a glance
tiles.text: Lieferando, Wolt, Uber Eats and 15+ more partners – all orders automatically flow into your POS. No manual transfers, no errors, no time wasted.
tiles.tagline: You save valuable time every day.

tiles.title: Automatic caller ID
tiles.text: Name, address and order history appear on screen at the first ring. Phone orders are taken 3× faster – no follow-up questions, no typos.

tiles.title: Driver app & GPS delivery zones
tiles.text: Every driver gets their own app with real-time GPS tracking. Delivery zones by distance, zone or postal code – definable directly on the map, adjustable anytime.

tiles.title: Revenue & real-time statistics
tiles.text: Daily, weekly and monthly reports at the push of a button: top products, delivery zones, payment methods. All GoBD-compliant reports are instantly exportable for your accountant.

tiles.title: All payment methods accepted
tiles.text: Cash, debit card, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal and Klarna – your POS accepts every payment type. TSE-certified and GoBD-compliant – legally secure from day one.

socialProof.headline: Over 200 restaurateurs run their business
socialProof.headlineBr: with the Gastro Master POS system.
socialProof.sub: From pizzerias to franchises – Gastro Master grows with every business.

alternating.headline: Your guests order themselves.
alternating.sub: QR code at the table – order instantly, no app needed
alternating.text1: No waiter, no waiting, no misunderstanding. Your guests scan the QR code at the table – and within seconds the order lands directly in the kitchen. No app download, no sign-up, no friction.
alternating.text2: Restaurateurs using QR code ordering report up to 30% higher table revenue through automatic upsell suggestions – and a noticeably more relaxed service flow during rush hours.
checks: QR code at the table – no app needed, ready instantly
Order reaches kitchen & bar in seconds

Service team relieved – more tables with the same staff

alternating.headline: Self-ordering terminal.
alternating.text1: The terminal guides your guests independently through your menu and automatically suggests popular extras and upgrades. No waiting, no misunderstandings – payment directly at the terminal, error-free in the kitchen.
alternating.text2: Restaurants with self-ordering terminals increase the average order amount by up to 25% – through targeted upsell suggestions that no waiter can deliver as consistently.
checks: Automatic upsell suggestions increase revenue by up to 25%

alternating.text1: No notepad, no shouting to the counter: Your service staff takes orders directly at the table via handheld – and the order lands in the kitchen and bar within seconds. No transfer errors, no time lost, no chaos during rush hours.

alternating.headline: All payments. Your terminal.

alternating.text1: Cash, debit card, credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay and Klarna – the Gastro Master POS accepts all common payment methods. Connection to any standard card terminal is included at no extra charge.
alternating.text2: Tip function, bill splitting and digital receipts by email are included as standard. Your guests pay how they want – and you have an overview of all revenue in real time.

teamCta.headline: Book your
teamCta.expectText: In the free initial consultation, one of our experts develops a tailored concept for your new POS system – free, non-binding and customized to your business. Afterwards, you freely decide whether to implement it with us.
teamCta.privacyNote: Your information is used exclusively for contact purposes and is not stored.

faq.headline: Frequently
faq.sub: More questions? Call us or write to us – we respond within 24 hours.

items.q: Why does my restaurant need a modern POS system?
items.a: A modern POS system for restaurants is far more than a cash register. It connects order intake, kitchen management, delivery service, employee management and statistics in one single system. Especially for [restaurants](/loesungen/restaurant) this saves time daily and significantly reduces billing errors.

items.q: Which POS systems require TSE in Germany?
items.a: Since 01.01.2020, all electronic POS systems in Germany require TSE (§146a AO, KassenSichV — Technical Security Device). Businesses without valid TSE risk fines of up to €25,000. The Gastro Master POS system is fully certified and meets all requirements of KassenSichV and GoBD compliance.

items.q: How much does a cloud POS system cost for my restaurant?
items.a: The Gastro Master POS system is available as a monthly subscription – without expensive one-time payments or hardware maintenance contracts. Cloud updates, support and all new features are included in the price. You can find all packages and prices in the [complete pricing overview](/preise).

items.q: Can I also use the POS system for delivery services?
items.a: Yes. The POS system is natively linked with the driver app, delivery zones and GPS tracking. Orders from the [digital ordering system](/produkte/webshop), the [own ordering app](/produkte/app) and directly at the register automatically flow into one workflow — no manual transfer needed. Ideal for anyone looking to [build their own delivery service](/loesungen/lieferservice-gruenden).

items.q: How quickly is the POS system set up?
items.a: Setup typically takes 1–2 business days. Our support team from Germany guides you through the entire setup and trains your team personally – on-site or via video call. Simply reach out through our [contact form](/kontakt).

items.q: Is the system GoBD-compliant and suitable for tax audits?
items.a: Yes. The Gastro Master POS system is fully GoBD-compliant. All transactions, cancellations and daily closings are immutably logged and can be exported at any time for a tax audit.
